scope.m128_status: M128 is a high-resolution uniform-midpoint numerical reference; it is not an exact integral
scope.purpose: numerical fidelity of M32 boundary quadrature against M128 and of Dice-M128 against the exact level-set Dice calculation
scope.statistical_status: descriptive numerical diagnostics on fixed held-out images; no hypothesis tests or condition-independence claims

specification.aurc_gap: absolute difference in tie-aware matched-risk AURC; within-score ties are averaged analytically

comparisons.interpretation: exact level-set Dice is the numerical reference
comparisons.label: Dice: M128 vs Exact
comparisons.name: dice_m128_vs_exact

comparisons.interpretation: M128 is a high-resolution numerical reference, not exact
comparisons.label: nHD: M32 vs M128
comparisons.name: nhd_m32_vs_m128

comparisons.interpretation: M128 is a high-resolution numerical reference, not exact
comparisons.label: nHD95: M32 vs M128
comparisons.name: nhd95_m32_vs_m128

specification.rank_agreement: Spearman average-rank correlation and Kendall tau-b
